title: Time Needed to Inform All Employees
titleCn: 通知所有员工所需的时间

testcases.input: n = 1, headID = 0, manager = [-1], informTime = [0] Output: 0 Explanation: The head of the company is the only employee in the company.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The head of the company is the only employee in the company.

testcases.input: n = 6, headID = 2, manager = [2,2,-1,2,2,2], informTime = [0,0,1,0,0,0] Output: 1 Explanation: The head of the company with id = 2 is the direct manager of all the employees in the company and needs 1 minute to inform them all. The tree structure of the employees in the company is shown.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The head of the company with id = 2 is the direct manager of all the employees in the company and needs 1 minute to inform them all. The tree structure of the employees in the company is shown.
